name: Haunted Sweets
description: Step into the eerie world of Haunted Pumpkin, a thrilling match-3 puzzle adventure! Navigate through 100 mysterious levels as you swap and match spooky icons like glowing ghosts, ancient bones, and magical pumpkins. Trigger powerful combos and unlock spectral boosters to clear the board before time or moves run out. With a vibrant, atmospheric glow and satisfying explosion effects, Haunted Pumpkin offers a perfectly balanced challenge for puzzle lovers. Can you survive the night and conquer the haunted grid?
instructions: Mouse Touch Click or tap and drag an item to swap it with an adjacent one Match Connect 3 or more identical items in a row or column to clear them Power-ups Match 4 or more items to create special blasters and spectral bombs for massive board cle
